\tzpentry{ID5645}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5645 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + \sum_{j\neq i}\sum_{(p,q)\in\mathcal{R}} K_{ij}^{(p:q)}\, \sin\!\big(p\,\phi_j - q\,\phi_i\big), \label{eq:kuramoto_pq} \end{equation}
